Video.summary: When one of Eastbridge's most powerful socialities, is murdered, it is discovered she has been running a call girl service and one name on her list of clients is Commissioner Scali!
Video.title: The Rolodex Madam

Video.summary: The Beach Boy arrives in LA and begins to kill drug dealers. Hunter and McCall must figure out his next move.
Video.title: The Beach Boy

Video.summary: McCall is charged with murder when the prime suspect in her dead detective husband's case is found dead.
Video.title: Requiem For Sergeant McCall

Video.summary: Hunter goes to Australia to help solve a murder involving a former girlfriend who's been missing for 3 years.
Video.title: Down And Under

Video.summary: A motorcycle cop is killed by a man on a "nighthawk." The killer motivated by a dispute over a game at a bar.
Video.title: The Shooter

Video.summary: A mentally disturbed surveillance expert attempts to "help" Hunter by killing a suspect and a witness.
Video.title: The Avenging Angel

Video.summary: A star high-school hockey player and friend of the Scali family - becomes a prime drug-ring suspect.
Video.title: The Puck Stops Here

Video.summary: Tony winds up in one of his own jail cells when he runs afoul of an imperious judge.
Video.title: Judgement Day

Video.summary: Commissioner -- and expectant father -- Tony Scali suddenly finds his own life on the line after he infiltrates a New York pornographic teenage film ring.
Video.title: Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 1

Image.alt: Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 1
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 1
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 1
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 1
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 1
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 1
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 1

Video.summary: A cocaine dealer being escorted by an obnoxious detective escapes. Hunter and the detective pursue her.
Video.title: The Snow Queen, Part 1

Video.summary: A concert pianist is paralyzed by fear when a man jailed for her attempted murder is released from prison.
Video.title: Any Second Now

Video.summary: Tony's son David is shocked when his friend Jason shoots Brad Harris, the school bully. What follows is a crisis of conscience.
Video.title: Guns & Sons

Video.summary: Sergeant McCall poses as a fashion model to expose a burglary ring preying on wealthy businessmen.
Video.title: Double Exposure

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall must track down a killer who has been shooting parolees.
Video.title: The Garbage Man

Video.summary: A musician helps search for the assailant of a pregnant woman being kept alive until she can give birth.
Video.title: A Child Is Born

Video.summary: The malicious leader of paramilitary neo-Nazis take Hunter and McCall captive while planning their next attack
Video.title: Bad Company

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall pose as spouses to investigate the murder of a girl whose death exposes a Soviet plot.
Video.title: The Girl Next Door

Video.summary: Commissioner Scali, kidnapped and seemingly destined for sudden death, narrowly escapes his fate with the help of an unsuspected ally -- porno movie producer Cyd Palmer.
Video.title: Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 2

Image.alt: Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 2
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 2
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 2
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 2
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 2
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 2
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 2

Video.summary: A Palm Beach society outcast is murdered as he is about to reveal something he says will rock the community. Chris and Rita go undercover to find out the secret.
Video.title: Social Call

Video.summary: Hunter falls in love with a beautiful professional killer who's connected to an arson case he's investigating.
Video.title: Straight To The Heart

Video.summary: A rapist returns to haunt Chris for sending him to jail.
Video.title: Good Time Charlie

Video.summary: The pursuit of the cocaine dealer continues and the plot thickens as Hunter and McCall's cases collide.
Video.title: The Snow Queen, Part 2

Video.summary: Rita and Chris go undercover as film execs when a local movie crew becomes the target of militants.
Video.title: Baser Instincts

Video.summary: Rita and Chris get involved when a wealthy over-sexed Palm Beach businessman puts out a contract on a smalltime loser who is partially responsible for the death of a woman in the businessman's well-paid harem.
Video.title: Wild Card

Video.summary: Chris and Rita investigate the murder of a vice cop, and Chris must deal with the victim's son.
Video.title: In Too Deep

Video.summary: Hutch goes undercover as a drug dealer to help Chris and Rita solve the murder of a young bystander.
Video.title: Powder Burn
